item.title: A CHAMPION'S FINAL LAP: SHAUN TORRENTE TO RETIRE AFTER 2026
item.description:
🏁 A CHAMPION'S FINAL LAP: SHAUN TORRENTE TO RETIRE AFTER 2026
Tuesday, April 28 - Shaun Torrente, the current UIM F1H2O World Champion with four titles to his name, has announced that the 2026 season will be his last as he confirms his retirement from the sport ... (Källa: F1H2O)
👉 https://www.f1h2o.com/post/a-champion-s-final-lap-shaun-torrente-to-retire-after-2026
#racerbåt #powerboat #svera #båtracing

item.title: KYRGYZSTAN INCLUDED FOR FIRST TIME EVER AS FULL 2026 UIM F1H2O CALENDAR IS ANNOUNCED
item.description:
🏁 KYRGYZSTAN INCLUDED FOR FIRST TIME EVER AS FULL 2026 UIM F1H2O CALENDAR IS ANNOUNCED
Sunday, April 19 The 2026 F1H2O World Championship will make history with its first-ever Central Asian Grand Prix, part of a seven-race calendar spanning the globe. Following the season ... (Källa: F1H2O)
👉 https://www.f1h2o.com/post/kyrgyzstan-included-for-first-time-ever-as-full-2026-uim-f1h2o-calendar-is-announced
#racerbåt #powerboat #svera #båtracing

item.title: SAMI SELIO JOINS FORCES WITH ALBERTO COMPARATO FOR THE 2026 SEASON
item.description:
🏁 SAMI SELIO JOINS FORCES WITH ALBERTO COMPARATO FOR THE 2026 SEASON
Friday, April 17: Sami Selio will line-up alongside Alberto Comparato under the Comparato Racing banner for the 2026 UIM F1H2O World Championship. Damon Cohen ran alongside Alberto ... (Källa: F1H2O)
👉 https://www.f1h2o.com/post/sami-selio-joins-forces-with-alberto-comparato-for-the-2026-season

item.title: TEAM ABU DHABI EXPANDS TO THREE BOAT LINE-UP OF ANDERSSON, STARK AND AL QEMZI
item.description:
🏁 TEAM ABU DHABI EXPANDS TO THREE BOAT LINE-UP OF ANDERSSON, STARK AND AL QEMZI
Monday April 13 - Team Abu Dhabi will be fielding three boats for the 2026 World Championship, driven by a leading line-up of Jonas Andersson, Erik Stark, and Rashed Al Qemzi. This means the ... (Källa: F1H2O)

item.title: UIM F1H2O WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP 2026 SEASON TO OPEN IN CAGLIARI, ITALY ON MAY 29TH-31ST
item.description:

Thursday, April 9th -The city of Cagliari, in the South of Sardinia, Italy will play host to the opening round of the 2026 UIM F1H2O World Championship season, as the years racing will ... (Källa: F1H2O)

item.title: MORIN AND DILLARD LEAD CHINA CTIC TEAM LINE UP FOR 2026
item.description:

Tuesday, March 30 - China CTIC Team have confirmed Peter Morin and Brent Dillard as their lead drivers for the 2026 season, meaning the team are returning to the line- up last fielded for the ... (Källa: F1H2O)

item.title: SHARJAH TEAM TO FIELD THREE BOATS IN 2026 AS TRASK JOINS WYATT AND ARAND
item.description:
🏁 SHARJAH TEAM TO FIELD THREE BOATS IN 2026 AS TRASK JOINS WYATT AND ARAND
Friday, March 27: Sharjah Team have announced they will be expanding their driver ranks for the 2026 season to allow them to field three boats for all the year's Grand Prix. Rusty Wyatt and Stefan ... (Källa: F1H2O)
👉 https://www.f1h2o.com/post/sharjah-team-to-field-three-boats-in-2026-as-trask-joins-wyatt-and-arand

item.title: ATLANTIC TEAM KEEPS LEADING LINE UP OF BENAVENTE AND JELF FOR 2026
item.description:
🏁 ATLANTIC TEAM KEEPS LEADING LINE UP OF BENAVENTE AND JELF FOR 2026
Wednesday, March 25: The newly renamed Atlantic Team will be competing in the 2026 F1H2O World Championship with the retained duo of Duarte Benavente and Ben Jelf. Benaventes legendary ... (Källa: F1H2O)
👉 https://www.f1h2o.com/post/atlantic-team-keeps-leading-line-up-of-benavente-and-jelf-for-2026
